questions.question: What digit exists at units place in 387вҒёвҒ¶?
questions.explanation: Unit digit of (387)вҒёвҒ¶ Cyclist of 7 : 7, 9, 3, 1 (After every 4 values, the pattern is repeating) Therefore, 86/4 i.e. Remainder = 2 Thus, the unit digit is 9 Hence, the correct answer is option B.

questions.question: A reduction of 20% in the price of apples enables Mohan to purchase 3 more apples for Rs 240. What is the original price of the apple?
questions.explanation: Let the original price of the apple = 10p And let's assume originally Mohan was able to purchase 'n' apples. Therefore; 10p X n = 240 ..(1) According to the 2вҒҝбөҲ condition; 8p X (n + 3) = 240 ..(2) From (1) & (2) => 10pn = 8p(n + 3) =>10n = 8 (n + 3) => 10n = 8n + 24 => 2n = 24 => n = 12 Now from (1) we will get; 10p = Rs 20

questions.question: The centre of the largest circle inside the triangle that can touch all 3 sides of the triangle is called-
questions.explanation: The centre of the largest circle inside the triangle that can touch all the 3 sides of the circle is called incentre. In case of the equilateral triangle incentre, orthocentre, circumcentre and centroid are same point.

questions.question: If xВі - 6xВІ + 12x - 8 is divided by x-a, then remainder is 27. What is the value of a?
questions.explanation: If we put x=a in xВі -6xВІ +12x -8, we get 27 (a)Ві -6(a)ВІ +12a -8 = 27 (a-2)Ві = (3)Ві a-2 =3 a =5

questions.question: If вҲҡ(54+20вҲҡ2) = (aвҲҡ2) - b (where a and b are rational numbers), then what is the value of a+b?
questions.explanation: вҲҡ(54+20вҲҡ2) = aвҲҡ2 - b вҲҡ[(5вҲҡ2)ВІ + (2)ВІ + 2*2*5вҲҡ2] = aвҲҡ2 - b вҲҡ(5вҲҡ2+2)ВІ = aвҲҡ2 - b 5вҲҡ2 + 2 = aвҲҡ2 - b On comparing both sides we get, a = 5, b = -2 Hence a + b = 5 - 2 = 3

questions.question: Mohit starts driving from Delhi to Ambala at 5 am and Rohit starts driving from Ambala to Delhi at 6 am. Rohit is 50% faster than Mohit. When will they meet if Mohit and Rohit are 300 km apart and Mohit's speed is 60 kmph?
questions.explanation: Distance covered by Mohit in 1 hour = 60 km. Distance between them when Rohit starts his journey = 300-60 = 240 km Rohit's speed = 60 x 1.5 = 90 km/h Their relative speed = 90+60 = 150 km/h Time after which they meet = 240/150 = 1.6 hours = 1 hour 36 minutes Hence they'll meet at 7:36 am

questions.question: What is the profit percentage of a dishonest cloth merchant who use a scale which measures less by 16.67% and also sells at a price 10% higher than the cost price?
questions.explanation: Let the cost be Rs 100/m and length of the cloth sold be 1m. 16.67% = (50/3)% = в…ҷ Hence actual cloth sold = 1 - в…ҷ = в…ҡ m Therefore, actual CP = 500/6 = Rs 250/3 SP = 110 Profit% = 100 x (110 - 250/3) / (250/3) = 80 x 100/250 = 32%

questions.question: If sec Оё + tan Оё = 3, what is the value of tan Оё?
questions.explanation: We know that secВІ Оё - tanВІ Оё = 1. Applying the formula (aВІ - bВІ) = (a + b)(a - b), we get (sec Оё + tan Оё)(sec Оё - tan Оё) = 1 Given, sec Оё + tan Оё = 3...(i) => 3 * (sec Оё - tan Оё) = 1 => (sec Оё - tan Оё) = в…“...(ii) Solving equations (i) and (ii) => 2tan Оё = 3 - в…“ => 2tan Оё = 8/3 => tanОё = 4/3

questions.question: A hall 10 m long, 2.5 m high and 4 m wide has one door of 1.5 m by 1 m and two windows of 1 m by 0.50 m. The cost of coloring the walls and the ceiling at Rs.12 per sq. m is
questions.explanation: Area of walls and ceiling = 2(10*2.5 + 2.5*4) + 10*4 = 110 mВІ Area to be colored = 110 - (1.5*1) - 2(1*0.5) = 107.5 mВІ Required cost = 107.5*12 = Rs.1290

questions.question: If Оё is a positive acute angle and tan 2Оё tan 3Оё = 1, then find the value of: 2 cosВІ 5Оё_________2 - 1
questions.explanation: tan 2Оё tan 3Оё = 1 tan 3Оё = 1/tan 2Оё = cot 2Оё tan 3Оё = tan (ПҖ/2 - 2Оё) 3Оё = ПҖ/2 - 2Оё or Оё = ПҖ/10 Hence, 2 cosВІ (5Оё/2) - 1 = cos 5Оё = cos (ПҖ/2) = 0

questions.question: If x + 1/16x = 1, then 64xВі + 1/64xВі will be
questions.explanation: x + 1/16x = 1 Multiplying by 4 on both sides 4x + 1/4x = 4 Cube both sides (4x + 1/4x)Ві = (4x)Ві + (1/4x)Ві + 3*4x*1/4x* (4x + 1/4x) 64 = 64xВі + 1/64xВі + 3*4 64xВі + 1/64xВі = 64 - 12 = 52

questions.question: If the cost price of 60 guavas is same as the selling price of 25 guavas, what is the gain or loss percentage?
questions.explanation: CP of 60 guavas = SP of 25 guavas 25 x SP = 60 x CP which gives SP/CP = 12/5 As SP is greater than CP, there will be profit. Profit % = (SP-CP)/CP x 100 = (SP/CP - 1)x100 = (12/5 - 1) x 100 = 140%.

questions.question: Triangle ABC is right angled at B. BN is perpendicular to AC. If AB = 3 cm, BC = 4 cm, find AN : NC
questions.explanation: ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/81355/image005.jpg) By Pythagoras theorem, AC = вҲҡ9+16 = 5 cm In triangles, ANB and ABC, вҲ ANB = вҲ ABC = 90бө’ вҲ A = вҲ A (common) Hence they are similar. AN/AB = AB/AC AN = 3 x в…— = 1.8 cm Hence, NC = 5 - 1.8 = 3.2 cm AN : NC = 1.8: 3.2 = 9:16

questions.question: In a parallelogram MNOP, the measure of angle N is of (4b-40)В° and the measure of angle P is of (2b-8)В°. Find the angle at O?
questions.explanation: In a parallelogram, angles N and P are the opposite angles and hence they are congruent to each other. 4b-40=2b-8 вҶ’2b=32 Therefore b=16 Hence the angle N has a measure of 4b-40=4 X 16-40=24В° Angle M is the consecutive angle, so it is 180В°-24=156В° Hence the angle O is equal to M which is also 156В°.

questions.question: [(3 - 4 sinВІx)/cosВІx]+ tanВІx = ?
questions.explanation: [(3 - 4 sinВІx)/cosВІx]+ tanВІx = 3(sec x)ВІ - 4(tan x)ВІ + (tan x)ВІ = 3(sec x)ВІ - 3(tan x)ВІ = 3((sec x)ВІ - (tan x)ВІ) = 3

questions.question: If a+b=1, find the value of aВі + bВі +3ab.
questions.explanation: aВі+bВі+3ab =(a+b)Ві -3ab(a+b)+3ab =1-3ab +3ab =1

questions.question: The length of a string between a kite and a point on the ground is 111. If the string makes an angle Оё with the level ground such that tanОё = 35/12, then how high is the kite?
questions.explanation: ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/575027/image004.jpg) Let AB = 35x and BC = 12x (AC)ВІ = (AB)ВІ + (BC)ВІ 111ВІ = 1225xВІ + 144xВІ xВІ = 9 x = 3 Therefore, height of the kite = 35 x 3 = 105 m

questions.question: Pipe A fills the tank at the rate of 60 cubic m/hr. Pipe B fills it in 4 hrs. If both are opened simultaneously, the tank is filled in 2 hrs. What is the volume of the tank?
questions.explanation: In 1 hr pipe A fills 60 cubic metre and pipe B fills Вј of the tank. Let the capacity of the tank be v cubic metre. Tank filled in 1 hour = 60+v/4=v/2 => v/4 = 60 => v = 240

questions.question: The average weight of all the 200 employees in an office is 68.2 kg, where в…– employees are ladies and the ratio of average weight of men and women is 7:5. The average weight of female employees is:
questions.explanation: 200 x в…– = 80 employees are ladies Let the average weight of men be 7n and that of women be 5n. 80 x 5n + 120 x 7n = 68.2 x 200 => 1240n = 13640 => n = 11 The required average weight = 5 x 11 =55 kg.

questions.question: How much degree represent the mechanical and electrical branches together in the pie chart?
questions.explanation: Mechanical + electrical = (30 + 10) = 40 100% seats are shown by 360В° 40% seats are shown by 360/100 X 40 = 144В°

questions.question: Number of seats in auto mobile branch is what percentage of number of seats in electronics?
questions.explanation: Number of seats in automobiles = 5/100 X 400=20 Number of seats in electronics = 15/100 X 400=60 Let number of seats in auto mobile is x% of no. of seats in electronics => 20 = x/100 X 60= 100/3 = 33.33%

questions.question: Number of students in mechanical branch is what percentage of sum of total seats in computer science, Auto mobile, electrical and electronics approximately?
questions.explanation: Percentage seats in (computer science + automobiles + electrical + electronics) = (15 + 5 + 10 + 15) = 45% Number of seats in above branches = (400 X 45)/100=180 Number of students in mechanical branch = (400 X 30)/100=120 Now let the mechanical students are x% of (computer + electrical + electronic + automobiles) I.e., (180 X x)/100=120 => x = (120 X 100)/180=66.66%

questions.question: Number of seats in auto mobile branch represents how much degree in piechart?
A man invests Rs 10,000 in some shares in the ratio 2:3:5 which pay dividends of 10%, 25% and 20% on his investment for that year respectively. Find his dividend income.
Rekha lent Rs.600 to Rakhi for 2 yrs and Rs.150 to Badr for 4 yrs at the same rate of interest. She received a total of Rs.162 as simple interest. The rate of interest is:
questions.explanation: Let, rate= r% per annum. By condition, (600 X r X 2)/100 + (150 X r X 4)/100 = 162 Or, 12r + 6r =162 Or, 18r = 162 Therefore, r= 9%.
